recommendations.title: Curfew
recommendations.overview: At the lowest point of his life, Richie gets a call from his estranged sister asking him to look after his nine-year old niece, Sophia, for a few hours.

recommendations.title: Before I Disappear
recommendations.overview: At the lowest point in his life, Richie receives a call from his estranged sister, asking him to pick up his eleven-year-old niece from school. What begins as a simple favor turns into a nighttime odyssey through New York City, where the two form an

recommendations.title: Annie Hall
recommendations.overview: New York comedian Alvy Singer falls in love with the ditsy Annie Hall.

recommendations.title: The Body
recommendations.overview: A woman’s body disappears mysteriously from the morgue without a trace. Police inspector Jaime Peña investigates the strange occurrence with the help of Álex Ulloa, the widower of the missing woman.

recommendations.title: Premam
recommendations.overview: Three stages in George's life, and three girls he encounters in each stage.

recommendations.title: Everything, Everything
recommendations.overview: A teenager who's lived a sheltered life because she's allergic to everything, falls for the boy who moves in next door.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Anesthesia
recommendations.overview: Multiple lives intersect in the aftermath of the violent mugging of a Columbia University philosophy professor.

recommendations.title: Scream 2
recommendations.overview: Two years after the Woodsboro murders, Sidney Prescott acclimates to college life while someone donning the Ghostface costume begins a new string of killings.

recommendations.title: The Grey Zone
